subject: don't count your chickens before they hatch

emails.subject: Don't Count Your Chickens Before They Hatch
emails.subject_base: Don't Count Your Chickens Before They Hatch
emails.body: Don't Count Your Chickens Before They Hatch I was a little dismayed after our lunch when you disclosed the number of broadband masters potentially close to signature. However, I was a little cheered up when I got back and checked with the Swap Group and found out we have 13 masters out for signatures right now. It still may be hard to beat you at your going rate...but, all I have to say is we're still in the game...GO TEAM!!!

emails.subject: Don't Count Your Chickens Before They Hatch

emails.subject: Re: Don't Count Your Chickens Before They Hatch
emails.subject_base: Don't Count Your Chickens Before They Hatch
emails.body: Re: Don't Count Your Chickens Before They Hatch Just because you have 13 masters out for signature doesn't mean you will get 13 signed masters back. What are you doing, calling in the troops so that you all can crush me! I sure thought Susan and Samantha wouldn't fall into your evil ways, but I guess I was wrong. Oh well, hopefully I will soon be able to shout from the rooftops that "EBS RULES!!!!!!!!!!!". Marie Heard Senior Legal Specialist Enron Broadband Services Phone: (713) 853-3907 Fax: (713) 646-8537 Marie_Heard@Enron.net Tana Jones@ECT 09/22/00 02:20 PM
